Celebration of fire, in the name of freedom still not found by most, or to the name of justice not yet given. In fire we must keep living, only together may we truly move forward.
New adventures on the valley, across the sky we ride, till darkness covers us, and home is found.
Windblown beauty never rests.
The thread of fate does truly rule, except it's we who knit our own reality. Best time to practice is now.

A stunning sight before me as I race on wheels of haste, to glimpse the waning day burn fires final clear to space, but hastened find my truest love is missing by my side, in tears of joy and sorrow do I bask in light and sigh. To you I hope this little gift of captured light and time, may remind you of my love when yours is next to mine ♥️ To Lisa 💕

Summer's edge upon the storm,
glides along the path in form,
childhood dreams await the heat,
as thunder passes beneath our feet.
Component of life, wild and without end.
Component of childhood, upon the backdrop of spring.
Component of sun through the skin of the earth
Life on the edge has it's benefits.

To find your favorite person in all facets is a rare thing. To spend more time and find more things, to grow into, to fix, to spread joy and knowledge through. To tell all your stories, to hear all of theirs. To share in your time, and patience, and a piece of your mind, as long as you take one of theirs. A sharing of a lifetime is a heavy thing, and to truly love is to share in that burden, and lift each other above, to the eternal sunset on the edge of existence.
Turbulent air shreds the sky into movie poster shades, as another day on the edge of the valley wanes to darkness.

On the edge of civilization we tread distant, and as I tag back and look ahead I am greeted with the most brilliant view I can but only barely look directly upon. As if the face of the cosmos were to washe over me, to shred my stardust bearing form back into the nebulae from whence they came. She is my everything, and then a bit beyond that.

Crimson clover dots the path upon our way, from out of the house and back again, but for only those times do we breathe our freedom, when we so choose to see the wildflowers to the side of what so gathers our full attention.
Quarantined eyes through the everyday glass, see more green in everyday grass.
Spring showers bring cotton down skies across the valley.

A joyous kinship is found in the cold, though no one so directly seeks to find it. Surrounding our life giving flames for thousands of years, we relax in the safety, and release our daily bonds, giving into the smiles and friendly words,  or guffaws and shared battles. To find it, is to create it by just disarming ourselves with others who do the same.
Take one down, pass it around...
Welcome to Driftwood
February returns and another journey, this time to Austin.

A coward's streak through a sea of red,
with everyone blind, too many left dead.

Medicare for all could save nearly 100k lives per year and cost less than all the services it replaces. Those who are against bringing up all people in a better and healthier world are lost fighting the wrong battles, and it's up to us to change it.

All so slow as to not be seen, but if you look away you're sure to miss it.
Your life is passing with every minute, be sure to soak in all you can, you are the final judge of its worth and merit.

Catnip mouse in a stocking with care,
Playing musical houses around like a fair,
We find ourselves in the company of love,
When we choose to be present, or given a shove.

Hiding behind our plates, we find ourselves in the thick of interaction and discussion. Or working to manage the disruption of our norm. Find a moment to be fun, and less serious, and feel a weight lifted in shared experience, even if only for a while. It is worth it.

How many miles are in a pen?
How much weight can words carry?
How do you see when nothing is there?

Endless folding layers of damascus patchwork cloud sprawl above the freshly sprouted neighborhood. Beauty lies just before and just beyond where you look to find it.

Upon adventures, great and small,
In our minds we wander, all.
Torn between the thoughts that catch,
Unsure of our footing, or on the right path.

But In growing, in learning,
We're so shaped like clay,
Better patterns are built,
In imagination through play.

yet here find our dreams,
looming and wistful.

Without mirrors, but at least an ounce of reflection, I see my eyes looking back at me below a flame of self expression, and soon more height than I could ever muster. With time he will see far more than I ever dreamed. 💙

In colors that explode in my eyes and entirely defy description, never have I seen such beauty, as I walk hopelessly attracted to the ends of the Earth, in a light that expands across the cosmos, l am filled with the all of this as I look on in unending wonder and perfect brilliance.

Multi billion year old regolith reflects the close enough to eternal light of Sol as we wonder and wander through our short section of borrowed time. She stays with us all for a time as we blast through the Galaxy, eventually to find her own new adventure among the stars.
Detail.
Nature's stained glass cells allow flight for this dragonfly.

Oh to gaze, to hold upon that which we cannot keep, only to touch in the moment, for light is only a slice of time that we borrow to muse upon it's beauty and shape, and then it's gone. The most beautiful eyes I've ever seen, I hope to hold as long as I breathe.
The astronaut Tom's of my love grace the ornate floors of 30 Rock as we complete our time in the city of heat and endless tourism.
A New Yorker is nothing without their will to move.

An adventure for us in only a handful of hours, yet our eyes happily soak in thousands of years of artistic achievements. So many leave us just enough glimpse of hope, of beauty, of human power to create, that we are more united, more complete, more capable of making our world exactly what we want. Also the gift shop was pretty great.
Soaked shoes along Broadway as we hoof a path through the city during a flash flood, Lisa remains my light through the darkness, and always down for a mini cupcake.
Entering the city at night makes it all the more exciting for the things you can't see.
The morning blooms upon another adventure, more than doubly sweet when shared as a pair. Together we journey upon the winds and find ourselves in the largest of seasonal fruit 🍎

Upon the day, celebrating a release from tyranny, too long ago to be remembered directly and used as inspiration for when regimes are no longer humane or just.
Life on the edge of the valley, horizon expanding out towards our wide bowl of mountains. A summer breeze pushes into our hearts if we let it in. The sky is on fire with hope if you choose to see it.
Don't act so surprised, you saw this coming too.

Backyard summer fires spark conversation, both external and within.
Have  in who you are, never back down, but always listen. Strive to be the truest form of yourself in every way, and make good art. Love and you will always find love in return.

The seemingly endless warming June twilight tugs at the fabric of our childhood, either in our reality as children, or deep within ourselves as adults. Grown up we are but larger trees built upon the core of a sapling. Branches cut or sunlight given changes our entire structure. Too often we forget that which makes us who we are, but perhaps the light and warmth of a summer night can get us close, we just have to remember to let go.

Upon the verdent pastures of our existence,
too often may we find change to be our ruination.
But it is these, as in all moments, should we pause,
and find our perspective anew,
only then may we be free
Earthshine waxing

Celestial bodies twinkle in the afterglow of a hot day,
Through the apple skin air of our fruitful planet we gaze,
Trapped in Paradise we make each day a prison or perfection,
Help the ones you love to see life for it's beauty,
And one day perhaps they'll see your truth in full.

A thing is the same even as it changes,
The same name, same idea,
The parts of the ship are all swapped out,
As with our hair, our cells, our ideas,
But we remain whole.

Change isn't always growth,
But we feel it just the same.
Another day older, hopefully wiser,
Hopefully hopeful when all seems hopeless.

Knowing that together we are all the same,
Yet different in all the ways
that makes us spectacular.
And we are one, when effort is given.
So may we never part,
Whatever we may become. ♥️
Over the fence, the world keeps on.
Future stage for a Sunday Sermon
"No one will ever believe you..."

Before they finished the first atomic bomb, there was a distinct worry from top scientists involved that the explosion might ignite the atmosphere itself, burning the entire world and effectively ending all life. Lucky for us, that is not what happened.

Upon the wings of chance
Let your spirit fly
Open yourself to the winds
Below a cotton candy sky

Tiny blossom, unexpected
Upon my doorstep, I to find
Without hesitation, I adore it
Peace living freely, in my mind
🌺🥰💕

Against odds we find each day the untouchable constant of our diurnal cycles, the endlessly powerful Earth beneath us spinning each day into existence, giving us an excuse to be better, to care a little more, to hurt a little less, and to choose to open our hearts to the love that's all around us. No one can tell us the right way to go, you just find it yourself, and know that it's right. To my love ♥️💕
"We choose..."

Take a moment to breathe. One second of peace you pick from the air and slice away from the rest of your life. Look up at the sky and know you're but a mote of dust invisible on this pale blue dot. Look down and see you're connected to the Earth and incredibly important to so many, and see that though both truths coexist, it's up to you which context to apply.

Faces constantly tell us a story. A non fiction account of our morning, about our lives so far, how our relationships are doing, even our relationship with ourselves. They swing wildly with the emotional tides of daily life, and even hold on to lines from fond memories, or terribly haunting ones. Masks only hide for so long. Show your true self, tell the story, share with those you love and find how easy it can be to find more to be fond of, and the story of your smile will carry your truth.

A modern relic of indestructible technology that survives well beyond its place in our daily lives. Still a symbol of communication, but with almost no applicable meaning beyond a connection to the past.

It is in the contrast; the pain and the anguish, the daily torment and longing, that truly give our colors beauty. A thing that make us call out in awe at the unending spectacle of purity and transience in every perfect moment as it is pulled without effort, almost against our will, from deep within. Search your existence for such a thing, or simply stumble upon it, but know there are few things greater. ⛈️💜

The day is nearly done, and with it your luminous brilliance. Stark, and perfect, and warm, then like a thief the horizon steals you away. I close my eyes and feel the cold creep in, but I know you'll return. A day is only the spinning of our view, and your beauty will never end, never stop warming my heart, and tomorrow is just a moment away in a pool of infinite possibility.

Lisa, you are my everything.
